title: Speak Easy
description:
Katie Thornton on cynicism, language learning, and Esperanto’s ban on slang

The post Speak Easy appeared first on Harper's Magazine.
hook: She learned Esperanto to understand a language designed to eliminate conflict—and discovered why humans will always find something to fight about.

title: In 1971, gay porn went mainstream
description: A year before Deep Throat, Boys In The Sand was smut with critical acclaim. Wiki Wormhole explores the moment gay porn went mainstream.
hook: Before mainstream porn existed, gay men made their own. Boys in the Sand proved smut could be cinema and changed everything.

title: Crescendo
description: What happened in Santiago, the matter that began my great downfall, the rupture in my previously hallowed existence, was this: I played the concert of my lifetime. A statement that might sound foolish, grandiose, ridiculous, I know, but consider this.
hook: A musician's greatest triumph becomes the catalyst for total collapse. This opening promises a reckoning with ambition's cost.
